hero.heading: We build software that
hero.description: From web apps to AI-powered automation, TopNotch delivers high-quality software solutions with speed, clarity, and craft.

services.heading: Services
services.subheading: End-to-end software solutions tailored to your business needs.
services.pageSubheading: End-to-end software solutions tailored to your business needs. From idea to production, we've got you covered.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Modern, performant websites and web applications built with the latest frameworks. From marketing sites to complex platforms.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications that deliver seamless experiences on iOS and Android.

items.title: AI & Automation
items.description: Integrate AI into your workflows. From intelligent chatbots to data pipelines, we help you work smarter.

items.title: Consulting
items.description: Technical strategy, architecture reviews, and team augmentation. We help you make the right technology decisions.

whyUs.heading: What sets TopNotch apart
whyUs.subheading: We combine speed, quality, and transparency to deliver projects that exceed expectations.

items.title: Ship fast
items.description: We move quickly without cutting corners. Lean sprints, rapid prototyping, and continuous delivery mean your product gets to market sooner.

items.title: Craft quality
items.description: Clean code, thorough testing, and thoughtful architecture. We build software that scales, performs, and stands the test of time.

items.title: Communicate clearly
items.description: No jargon, no black boxes. You get full visibility into progress, decisions, and trade-offs at every step of the project.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.subheading: A selection of projects that showcase our capabilities across web, mobile, AI, and consulting.
portfolio.featuredSubheading: A selection of recent work that showcases our capabilities.

cta.heading: Ready to build something great?
cta.description: Let's talk about your project. We'll help you figure out the right approach, timeline, and stack.

contact.title: Contact — TopNotch
contact.description: Get in touch with TopNotch. Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.heading: Let's build something great
contact.subheading: Tell us about your project. We'll get back to you within one business day.

contact.step2: We schedule a discovery call to understand your project in detail.
contact.step3: You receive a proposal with scope, timeline, and pricing.
